titleStmt.title: SII 25.129: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 129. (A.R. No. 129 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the first prākāra in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.

p.hi: Māṟavarmaṉ Sundara-pāṇḍya I ‘who gave Śōṇāḍu’ Year 20+1: 1236 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in the year 20+1, Kaṉṉi ba 6, Thursday; Pushya which details may correspond to 1236 A.D., September 25.

The king in this record is described by the title Śōṇāḍu-vaḻaṅgi-aruḷiya. It records an order of the king pertainig to the sale of kāṇi-paṟṟu lands excluding the share of Kāṅgaiyar-kūṟu in the village Chakravarti-nallūr in Paṉaiṅkuḍipaṟṟu of Tiruttiyūr-vaṭṭam as iṟaiyili-kārāṇ-kiḻamai and as maḍappuṟa-iṟaiyili to Śrīkaṇṭha-śiva, an āṇḍār of Tirujñānasambandaṉmaḍam to the east of Śrītaḷi in the tirumaḍaiviḷḍgam of the temple of Tiruttaḷiyāṉḍa-nāyaṉār at Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅgavaḷanāḍu by Māḷavarmāṇikkam Tirukkāṉaippēruḍaiyāṉ alias Māḷavachchakravatti of Senpoṉmāri in Tāḻaiyūr-nāḍu. Śrīkaṇṭhaśiva is said to have belonged to the mudalīs of Āchāramaḻagiyāṉ-maḍam, a santāṉa of Teṉkuḷaṅgaraikkīḻai-maḍam at Selvat-Tiruvārūr. The sale of lands included the income from several taxes obtained as kaḷḷar-kāṇi from Kaḷḷar. Taxes like kaḍamai, kaṟpūra-vilai, achchu, and other kind of taxes of the nāḍu, poṉvari, antarāyam, veṭṭi-muṭṭāvāḷ, kāṇi-ārāṭchi, ūrāṭchi, pāḍikāval, ūrāṭchippēṟu, etc. are referred to.

Further it records the sale of land, made taxfree, to Śrīkaṇṭha-śiva of the above mentioned maṭha, after receiving the price-value of 10 āṉaiachchu, which was taken to viḷaiyāvaṇakaḷam by Māḷavachchakravatti. This is stated to be the sale-deed pertaining to the above transaction and not any other price-deed (poruḷmāvaṟudi) and it should not have error of the order (ōlai), draft, oral, descriptive etc. Māḷavamāṇikkam Tirukkāṉaippēruḍaiyāṉ Māḷavachchakravatti, who appears as the signatory was one of the persons who executed the sale of lands to Śrīkaṇṭha-śiva. A number of other individuals are mentioned as signatories. Among the boundaries of the sale land, the record mentions the villages Mummuḍi-Chōḷaṉ and Kāḷaiyarkālanallūr. The office of tiruvāykkēḻvi is mentioned at the beginning of the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruvākkeḻvikku mel śrī komāṟu paṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉac cakkravattikaḷ coṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya śrī sundarapāṇṭi
yadevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10vatu netirāmāṇṭu kaṉṉināyiṟṟu Apara[ pakṣattu] viyāḻakkiḻamaiyu ṣaṣṭhiyum peṟṟa pūcattuṉāḷ tāḻaiyūr nāṭ
ṭuc ceppoṉmāri māḷavamāṇikkam tirukkāṉaip peruṭaiyāṉāṉa teṉkuḷakkaraik ki
ḻai maṭattu san=tāṉattu Ācāramāmaḻakiyāṉ tirumaṭattu mutaliyāppiḷḷai keraḷaciṅkavaḷaṉāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirupputtūr Uṭaiyār tiruttaḷiyāṇṭa nāyaṉār tirumaṭai viḷā
kattu śrītaḷik kiḻkarait tiruñāṉa campantaṉ tirumaṭattu Irukkum Āṇṭārkaḷil śrīkaṇṭamivaṟku viṟṟukuṭutta Ūrāvatu . tiruttiyūr vaṭṭattu paṉaiṅkuṭippaṟṟil
cakravatti nallūrkku Ellaiyāvatu . kiḻ pārkellai mummuṭi coḻa nila melellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kāvāṉkuḻi vaṭavellaikkum melpāṟkellai kāḷaiyar kālanallū
ṟ kiḻellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai peruṅkovaṉūr nilaikkut teṟkum Āka Icainta peruṉāṉkellaik kuḷpaṭṭa nilattil kāṅkaiyarkūṉāṉa cempāti nakki niṉṟa cem
pātiyil naṅ kāṇippaṟṟāṉa nilamum Ivarkku Iṟaiyili kārāṇ kiḻamaiyākavum viṟṟu kaḷḷar kāṇiyāy kaḷḷar pakkal nāṅ koṇṭu varum kaṭamai kaṟpūrāvilai Accu
maṟṟu ṉāṭeṉṟa varikalum poṉvari Antarāyamum veṭṭi muṭṭāvāḷum kāṇi Ārāṭciyu Aricaliyu pāṭikāvalu Ūrāṭcippeṟum maṟṟum paṇṭu meṟppaṭṭaṉavum Ivaṟ
ku Iṟuppārkaḷākavum viṟṟu Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ Ivarpakkal Aṟakkoṇṭa poṉṉukku lāṉaiaccu 10 Ivvaccu pattu vilai yāvaṇak kaḷatte kāṭṭi Oṟṟikkaic cok koṇṭu
viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ māḷavar māṇikkam tirukāḷaip peruṭaiyāṉāṉa māḷavac cakravattiyeṉ śrīkaṇṭaśivaṟku . Ippaṭi viṟṟuk kuṭutta Iṉṉilattil melṉokkiya ma
ramum kiḻṉokkiya kiṇaṟum nattamum nattappāṭum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavukkum Ituve vilaiyolaiyāvatākavum Ituvallatu veṟuvilai māvaṟutip poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷ
cilavolai kāṇavum kāṭṭavum kaṭavatallavākavum . Orukālāvatu mirukālāvatu mukkālāvatum vilaiyolaiyāvatākavum . Olaikkuṟṟam Eḻuttu
k kuṟṟam colkuṟṟam poruṭ kuṟṟam Ekkuṟṟamum collak kaṭavatallavallavākavum . Ivvūr ṉāṉkellaiyilu nam kūṟāṉa cempāti candrādityavat celvatākak kalli
lum cempilum veṭṭuvittut tiruccūlakkallum nāṭṭuvittukoḷvatākac cammatittu Ippaṭi maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyākac cammatittu Ippaṭi maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu vilai pramāṇam paṇṇik
kuṭutteṉ māḷavarmāṇikkam tirukkāṉaip peruṭaiyāṉāṉa māḷavac cakravatti yeṉ śikaṇṭaśivaṟku . māḷava māṇikkam tirukkāṉaip
peruṭaiyāṉāṉa māḷavac [ cakrava] tti Eḻuttu Ivvilai pramāṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivai ti ṇṭa pātāra(ā)yaṉ E
1. Portion at the end are lost.

ḻuttu Ivai Ātiyūr Uṭaiyāṉ cīrāmaṉ yaṉāṉa kurukularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Ivai kaḷuruṭaiyā y yak koṇṭāṉ colaiyāṉā
ṉa Aḻakiya pāṇṭiya viḻuppātirāyaṉ Eḻuttu . Ippaṭi Ivai ciṟuvayal Atiyāṉ ḷḷāṉāṉ māḷavakaṇṭa muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai cerapāṇ^1^
Digital edition of SII 25.129 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
